title: reseda phyteuma subsp. collina
intro: Reseda phyteuma subsp. collina, also known as the colline reseda, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The colline reseda is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
